text: Hey, I get why you loved Barbie, but I’ve gotta say, Margot Robbie’s performance BLEW ME AWAY! Her depth and humor carried the film. I felt every emotion! Can’t agree on everything, but her acting was perfection!!!
Is Joker: Folie à Deux more divisive than the first? Seems like everyone’s either praising or panning its bold swings.

text: Isn't it wild how Barbie (2023) pushes this super idealized view of empowerment but kinda glosses over deeper systemic issues?
